name: Hotel Libidine
description:
Isekai Love Hotel!

As you wake up in the sumptuous Hotel Libidine, you realize that this is no ordinary lodging. With an array of women at your disposal, their sole purpose is to please and fulfill your every sexual fantasy. The staff members are trained escorts who are more than happy to cater to your needs, ensuring that your every desire is fulfilled in the most luxurious way possible. Welcome to the height of pleasure, where Hotel Libidine offers nothing but pure indulgence and satisfaction.
